typography.logo_text_treatment: CSS drop-shadow for 3D effect. Half white, half soft gold. text-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.2), 0px 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing. p-6 to p-12 for sections. Cards with p-6.
spacing_and_layout.grid: Bento-style or neat e-commerce grid (grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4). gap-6 or gap-8.
spacing_and_layout.surface_strategy: Neumorphism or subtle Glassmorphism. Prefer clean, crisp edges with 1px border (#E5E5E5) and soft shadows (shadow-sm).

components.cards: Flat background (#FFFFFF), 1px border (#E5E5E5), rounded-xl, soft hover lift (-translate-y-1, shadow-md).
components.buttons: Primary buttons: bg-[#B38B36] text-white hover:bg-[#9A752B] rounded-full or rounded-lg. No heavy animations, just subtle scale or color transition.
components.navigation: Sticky top bar, z-50, background #FFFFFF/90 with backdrop-blur-md. Clean links, dark gold hover state.
components.hero: Center aligned 'BRANE' text with 3D effect. 'Marketplace Premium' text above with 4 stars. Light wood/soft white background.
components.icons: lucide-react, 1.5 stroke width, clean and minimal.

animations.general: Strictly minimal. NO heavy animations. Use simple Framer Motion fade-ins (opacity 0 to 1, y: 10 to 0). Quick durations (0.2s - 0.3s).
animations.hover: Subtle color changes, slight drop-shadow increases.

specific_instructions: Text language MUST be in Portuguese (Português BR).
Hero section MUST have 4 stars at the top with text 'Marketplace Premium'.
The word 'BRANE' in the hero MUST be half white and half soft gold. Use CSS background-clip: text with a linear-gradient(to right, #FFFFFF 50%, #B38B36 50%).
Add 3D effect to the logo and 'BRANE' name using CSS `drop-shadow(0px 4px 6px rgba(179,139,54,0.4))`. NO complex 3D libraries.
Keep everything high-performance, fast loading, accessible, and responsive.
